title: Scaling with Golang
excerpt: A deep dive into why we transitioned our mission-critical validation engines to Go — achieving a 40% reduction in P99 latency through lightweight goroutines and efficient memory management.

title: NLP in FinTech
excerpt: How we utilize Natural Language Processing to automate risk assessment — implementing custom NER models with Python and spaCy to increase document processing throughput by 3x.

title: The EM Shift
excerpt: Reflections on transitioning from Staff Engineer to Engineering Manager — balancing technical debt with feature delivery and empowering teams to build sustainable solutions.
